title: San Francisco: Exploratorium Ticket - 700+ Hands-On Exhibits
content: Immerse yourself in a world of curiosity as you touch, tinker, and play with 700+ hands-on exhibits at San Francisco’s iconic Exploratorium with this full-day admission ticket. *   5 5 out of 5 stars  J Julia – United States January 17, 2025 - Verified booking  The exhibits were so fun and dynamic! 5 5 out of 5 stars  V Victor – United States January 6, 2025 - Verified booking  The grandchildren (ages 7 and 9) loved it. 5 5 out of 5 stars  S Stewart – Australia May 28, 2024 - Verified booking  There was only one issue: not enough time. Read more     5 5 out of 5 stars  N Nga – Vietnam January 14, 2024 - Verified booking  Amazing experience, especially for kids. Better to go with companions rather than alone     5 5 out of 5 stars  L Laura – United States November 23, 2023 - Verified booking  This museum is fun for all ages.

title: Art | Mountain View - Google Visitor Experience
content: The public art at the Google Visitor Experience pays homage to community and innovation. Inside the Google Store, Cafe, and Huddle, you’ll find artworks from local artists who are a part of Google’s Artist in Residence program. Outdoors, explore life-sized art pieces facilitated by Burning Man Project, with input from the local community. We invite you to explore the outdoor plaza artworks through curiosity, touch, and play. Facilitated by Burning Man Project, the group of six interactive and imaginative artworks were selected in collaboration with the local Mountain View community. At a series of gatherings that inspired the artwork’s themes, we listened to the community’s stories of childhood adventure and curiosity, learned how people orient themselves through landmarks, and heard a real desire for experiences that are playful. social\_type\_Instagram https://www.instagram.com/theverymany/. https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/avKkGO81StIC0xjPWt9zlzcWRzJ3ywa9zGJDyZOmZ8rOOgDU3qL8HNtZQpATIp5q6JhhLIrnYeik5ayB7hEi9OZiAwHInknw0cNTKXr3kdpsNfPLKug. https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/B3CYPgsE-lhkLa7shptPDi6IEzPu7XFoKFBDfhCVEv0FP6MvgwagJyfSpoUO3Ijnmi6rTHWbDbo3\_RF9I18OtAhAnVuRK57tgI5-Deuo49p48trx35Y. social\_type\_Facebook https://www.facebook.com/people/Mr-and-Mrs-Ferguson-Art/100063553241686/. social\_type\_Instagram https://www.instagram.com/zacharycoffinart/. social\_type\_Instagram https://www.instagram.com/softlab/. social\_type\_Instagram https://www.instagram.com/julianvossandreae/. At the Google Visitor Experience, you can find Artist in Residence artwork in the Cafe, the Huddle, and the Google Store.

title: San Francisco Gregangelo Museum - Immersive Interior Art Tour
content: Things to Do in San Francisco. San Francisco Gregangelo Museum - Immersive Interior Art Tour. Tripadvisor gives a Travelers’ Choice award to accommodations, attractions and restaurants that consistently earn great reviews from travelers and are ranked within the top 10% of properties on Tripadvisor. “There is nothing like this anywhere!“ Step into San Francisco's Ultimate Weird House, dubbed "the most unusual house in the city, if not the universe" by the San Francisco Chronicle. The tour guides of this gorgeous (inside and out) museum draw you into their spell, immersing you in a landscape that teases and squeezes your imagination, inviting your better angels to stay with you even after their tours have ended . *   Image 6 ### San Francisco Gregangelo Museum - Immersive Art Garden Tour 4.9 (13) Private and Luxury from $127.00 per adult.
